context.setting: Watching TV with TV on Right

episode_text:
day=2; meal=bite-sized pizza and broccoli; setting=Watching TV with TV on Right; time_of_day=evening;
preferences: microwave_time=2 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize right occlusion; robot_speed=medium; skewering_axis=perpendicular to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=inside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=not applicable; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=LED; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=button; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=LED; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=button; retract_between_bites=yes; bite_dipping_preference=do not dip; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=1000 sec

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN minimize right occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to avoid blocking a social partner on the right. IF dining context involves watching TV on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN minimize right occlusion BECAUSE the user also chose to preserve visibility toward a right-side attentional target, indicating a broader right-side occlusion sensitivity rather than a purely social-only effect.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF dining context involves watching TV on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE the user selected a lower-effort transfer style that reduces the need to lean forward while attending to a right-side visual target.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF transfer_mode is outside mouth transfer AND dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN medium BECAUSE the user selected an outside-mouth transfer that balances comfort and reachability in a social setting. IF transfer_mode is inside mouth transfer, THEN not applicable BECAUSE this parameter does not apply when the robot delivers food directly into the mouth.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user chose explicit signaling, which is consistent with avoiding ambiguity from conversational mouth movements in social settings. IF dining context involves watching TV on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user again preferred explicit initiation, indicating a stable tendency toward deliberate user control rather than automatic or mouth-based initiation.

IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user chose explicit signaling for drink initiation in a social setting. IF dining context involves watching TV on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user again selected explicit initiation for drinking, supporting a stable preference for manual readiness signaling.

IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user chose explicit signaling for mouth-wiping initiation in a social setting. IF dining context involves watching TV on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user again selected explicit initiation for wiping, indicating a consistent preference for deliberate control.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN perception BECAUSE the user preferred reliable automatic detection for bite completion rather than requiring extra manual input. IF dining context involves watching TV on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN perception BECAUSE the user again chose automatic bite-completion detection, indicating trust in reliable automation for this specific step.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user chose explicit completion signaling for drinking. IF dining context involves watching TV on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user again preferred explicit completion signaling for drinking, suggesting they do not favor gesture-based automatic completion for this task.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user chose explicit completion signaling for mouth wiping. IF dining context involves watching TV on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN button BECAUSE the user again preferred explicit completion signaling for wiping, indicating a stable preference for manual control on this task.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN yes BECAUSE the user preferred reducing prolonged visual obstruction in a social setting, even at the cost of longer meal time. IF dining context involves watching TV on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN yes BECAUSE the user also preferred retracting when a right-side visual target was present, indicating willingness to accept longer meal time to keep the right side less obstructed.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food includes a dip or sauce AND dining context is social with a person on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like, THEN less BECAUSE the user preferred some dipping while limiting messiness in a social context. IF food has no dippable item or sauce, THEN do not dip BECAUSE dipping is not applicable. IF dining context involves watching TV on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is food without sauce or dip, THEN do not dip BECAUSE the observed meal had no dipping component and the user selected no dipping.

wait_before_autocontinue_seconds.user_tendencies: IF dining context involves watching TV on the right AND affective_state is unspecified/neutral-like AND food_condition is any food, THEN 1000 sec BECAUSE the user selected a very long wait before automatic continuation, consistent with wanting ample time to attend to the meal while also focusing on a right-side visual activity.
